retry_reason: Not a wrapper — the put is part of internal cleanup after a successful creation; failure in ipv6_add_addr means no object to release.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to add a link-local address to an IPv6 interface: configure address, optionally set optimistic DAD flag, call ipv6_add_addr, then add prefix route, start DAD, and release the reference. The refcount management (in6_ifa_put) is incidental cleanup within broader business logic.
